assets.alt: Flat liquid-glass comparison board showing several LinkedIn content service paths for a B2B team
assets.notes: Generated with Codex image generation and saved to the owned post asset directory.
assets.final_prompt: Create a 1600x700 Sell In Public blog hero image. Flat premium B2B editorial image, no text, no logos, no brand names. Subject: a buyer comparing several LinkedIn content provider operating models. Show a polished comparison board with five distinct paths: AI tool, founder ghostwriting, employee advocacy platform, employee content engine, and managed outbound. Use abstract icons only, no readable labels. Include decision tiles, connected buyer-signal nodes, and a central evaluation grid. Style: matte liquid-glass panels, crisp geometric shapes, warm off-white background, graphite lines, muted teal, coral, deep green, soft blue accents, restrained and professional. High-quality raster, inspectable, spacious, no typography, no LinkedIn logo, no people photos.
